Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kazan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — The Kazan are a group the Wei clan is negotiating trade rights with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 8''' — The Kazan are identified by armor and a red sash, with banners bearing three stone dogs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Jades from Kazan gathered on the stage.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — The Kazan raid both the Wei and the Li in Sacred Valley.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Kazan is associated with a deception mentioned by the Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — The Kazan are a clan with members present in the area.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — A Kazan spearman once ran Jaran through.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — The Kazan were supposed to host the Seven-Year Festival this year.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
